introText: Featuring images and videos of lab members participating in activities beyond the lab, such as delivering impactful talks, celebrating successful defenses, published papers, and other joyful milestones. Together we cherish both our scientific achievements and the moments of happiness that come from shared successes and teamwork.

items.heading: Scholar's Day 2 BME
items.summary: Sharing protein science through a simple origami analogy that made the idea instantly accessible.
bullets: Proteins are really like origami, one wrong fold and they don't work

items.heading: Scholar's Day 1 BME
items.summary: Introducing incoming BME students to research in Chowdhury Lab and the Nanovaccine Institute.
bullets: Prof. Chowdhury addressing incoming BME freshmen students about research in Chowdhury Lab and Nanovaccine Institute

items.title: CASP14 + NeurIPS Dec 2020
items.heading: CASP14 & NeurIPS Talk
items.summary: A snapshot of AI-guided protein structure prediction during a major moment for the field.
bullets: Predicting protein structures from amino acid sequences

items.title: Chowdhury Thesis Defense
items.heading: Chowdhury PhD Defense
items.summary: A milestone presentation spanning protein design, optimization, and synthetic channels.
bullets: Design of porins, enzymes, and antibodies
